name: Integration Schemas
description: Defines and exports the Zod/type schemas that describe the data shapes exchanged with external integrations (Jira, Notion) at the store boundary.

riskMetrics.riskJustification: After pinning notion.ts to notion-integration, this zone contains only jira.ts and its barrel index.ts. Low cohesion is inherent to a schema-only zone with no shared internal logic. When a Jira adapter is added, this zone should be reconsidered for merging into a jira-integration zone.
